codeReview.summary: The original feature commit 0e772890 was not sufficient on its own, but the milestone's newest grounded benchmark evidence supersedes the earlier fallback-only run. sharedStateObservations.observation: For this milestone, scrutiny must evaluate session-stability features against the newest grounded benchmark evidence rather than the original feature-local handoff alone; later fixes can legitimately supersede an earlier fallback-only transcript for the same contract assertions.
